The '''Gromas Belt''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] located in the [[Gromas system/Legends|Gromas system]], within the [[Perkell sector/Legends|Perkell sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Gromas (star)|Gromas]].<ref name="The Blood Moon" /> In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Chronology note">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}} places the outbreak of the [[Candorian plague/Legends|Candorian plague]] on [[Dentaal]] on 36:2:12, which falls in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. {{FactFile|130|MAD 1-4|General Crix Madine}} tie together the events of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' and [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']], and Madine's own recollections in [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] as follows: upon learning of the [[Dark Trooper Project]], Madine alerts the Rebel Alliance to the project's existence, thus starting the events of ''Dark Forces''. Shortly afterwards, Madine is ordered to release the Candorian plague on Dentaal, an event which is dated to 36:2:12 per the Adventure Journal. Madine vanishes into the wilderness shortly afterwards, spending a week in the jungles of Dentaal before escaping and fleeing the planet—only to be captured almost immediately by General [[Rom Mohc]] and imprisoned on [[Orinackra]]. Kyle Katarn then frees Madine from Orinackra, and Madine is then involved in the [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|battle]] at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' states that only a short amount of time passed between Madine telling the Alliance about the Dark Troopers and his defection. The length of time Madine spends on the run places his capture and imprisonment on Orinackra firmly in the month 36:3, or the first month of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Therefore, the events of ''Dark Forces'' prior to the [[mission to Orinackra]] fall in 0 ABY, and the remainder of the game and the battle at Corellia both occur in 1 ABY.</ref> [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[operative]] [[Jan Ors]] traveled through the Gromas Belt aboard their [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'',<ref name="Dark Forces">''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''</ref> while en route to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Gromas 16]].<ref name="The Blood Moon" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Kyle's ship weaves through an asteroid belt, makings its way to the Blood Moon in the Gromas system.|The Gromas Belt appeared in the ''Dark Forces'' script|<ref name="Dark Forces Official Player's Guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>}}
The Gromas Belt first appeared without identification in the [[1995]] [[Wikipedia:First-person shooter|first-person shooter]] ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'', developed and published by [[LucasArts]].<ref name="Dark Forces" /> It was first identified in "[[Kyle Katarn's Tale]], Mission 3: The Blood Moon," a [[2005]] ''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]'' scenario written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Abel G. Peña]] and published on [[Wizards.com]].<ref name="The Blood Moon" /> ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', a [[2009]] reference book written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]], placed the Gromas [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the Gromas Belt, in grid square Q-7.<ref name="TEA" />
